description: Bonifacio Caput, a 45-year-old maintenance technician, was exposed to chlorine gas during a workplace accident. As the occupational health physician in GNU Health (Login: admin / gnusolidario), manage his acute care by documenting an active condition of Reactive Airways Dysfunction Syndrome or Toxic Inhalation (ICD-10 J68 or subcode). Record a clinical evaluation for Bonifacio with a heart rate of at least 100 bpm and at least one other acute vital sign. Prescribe both a bronchodilator and a systemic corticosteroid, order at least two relevant laboratory tests, and schedule a follow-up appointment for pulmonary reassessment 7 to 14 days from today.
